description: Different stack (Python) — generated agents and rules adapt to the language, not hardcoded JS

files.src/main.py:
from fastapi import FastAPI
app = FastAPI()

expected_behavior: detects the stack as Python (FastAPI + pytest) — does not assume JavaScript
the generated CLAUDE.md Stack section names FastAPI, pytest, and Python explicitly
the builder agent's scope and verify-all.sh reference Python tooling (pytest, ruff, etc.) not npm/vitest
names the language detection method in its summary so the user can confirm
